sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince's optimal f method for multi-system portfolios. Uses AHPR and ECM to calculate portfolio HPR variance via SD² = AHPR² - ECM². Requires calculation of arithmetic mean HPR and estimated compound mean (accounting for correlations) before determining optimal f fraction. Optimal f value itself not specified in excerpt.

source_rule_text: When combining multiple market systems with positive arithmetic mathematical expectation, position sizing should be based on the Arithmetic mean HPR (AHPR) and Estimated Compound Mean (ECM) to calculate the standard deviation of HPRs using the formula SD² = AHPR² - ECM².
